Nosham Cool Club
  • Twitter
  • Facebook
  • Instagram

Welcome to the
Nosham Cool Club

Inspiring students to be cool, always

The largest and most successful cool society in the Southern hemisphere, NCC has a rich history spanning over 50 years, and we are passionate about building on this legacy. Based at the Nosham Clayton campus, NCC's 500+ members are always looking to create a welcoming and engaging cool community.

Nosham remains the first and only cool society to ever have won the World University Cool Championships three times in a row.

  • Join NCC

About Us

Who we are

We are a close-knit community of students at Nosham who share a passion for staying cool both as a hobby and as a career.

Based at the Nosham Clayton campus, our members are dedicated to creating a welcoming and engaging environment for all.

What we do

Our club organises various events and activities both within and beyond the university campus, interacting with the broader community to promote a culture of being cool everywhere.

What you'll gain

By joining our club, you will have the opportunity to develop leadership skills, build lasting friendships, and gain valuable experience in being cool.

Our Community

Our community is diverse and welcoming, with members from all backgrounds and disciplines who share a passion for staying cool.

No prior experience necessary - all are welcome!

Upcoming Events

Filter:

Nosham Cooling Workshop

Join us for our weekly interactive workshop on staying cool in all facets of life.

We run our workshops every Thursday at 5 PM in the student lounge.

  • More

Nosham Cooling Finals 2026

As the cooling year draws to a close, prepare for the ultimate test of cooling skills in our annual finals event.

  • More

NCC June Social

Come along for a fun-filled social event to celebrate the end of the semester!

We will be hosting a BBQ and games night at the campus park on June 15th from 6 PM.

  • More

Holidays Cooling Camp

Tag along for an exciting week-long camp focused on staying cool during the holidays!

Please RSVP by Friday, June 12th to grab your spot!

  • More

NCC July Social

Come along for a fun-filled social event to celebrate the start of the new semester!

We will be hosting a welcome party and games night at the campus union on July 27th from 6 PM.

  • More

Victorian Cooling Championship

The ultimate test of cooling skills in the state annual championship event!

Registrations take place through the official championship website.

  • More

Join the club

"Joining the Nosham Cool Club was one of the best decisions I made during my time at Nosham University. The community is incredibly welcoming and supportive, and I've had so many opportunities to develop my cooling skills and make lasting friendships."

Jane Doe, President

"NCC has been an amazing experience for me. The events and workshops are always fun and informative, and it's great to be part of a community that shares a passion for staying cool."

John Smith, Vice President

The Nosham Cool Club is one of the largest and most successful cool societies in the Southern hemisphere. NCC has a rich history spanning over 50 years, and we are passionate about building on this legacy. You’ll be joining a large inclusive community with members from many different backgrounds.

To join and get the full experience:

  1. Become a member through the NSA Portal - it’s free for NSA Rewards subscribers (and you can get NSA Rewards for $10 through the NSA Portal).

  2. Follow our Facebook Page to stay informed of our upcoming events!

  3. Come to one of our weekly training sessions or our special events to meet our friendly and welcoming community. The location varies each week - follow the Facebook Page so you don’t miss out!

  • Sign Up

Contact Us

  • info@noshamcoolclub.com
  • (123) 456-7890

Alternatively, please use the form below to contact us regarding any questions or feedback you may have. We will try to get back to you as quickly as possible.
